Text[0]: Hey, <Split(<Highlight>ObjectParameter(1)</Highlight>, ,1)/>. Neyuni and I will look into an alternative cure for psychonekrosis as best we can.
Text[1]: In the meantime, you should focus on preparing for the cruiserweight division. It's filled with fearsome fighters, and I want you in peak condition when you face them.

Text[0]: Hehe, Yaana has accepted her loss rather well. I can tell just by looking at her how thrilled she is to be acting as your second.
Greetings, <Split(<Highlight>ObjectParameter(1)</Highlight>, ,1)/>. We ask for your patience as we proceed with preparations for cruiserweight matches.
Welcome to the Matchlock Menagerie. I'm afraid there are no longer any animals left, but you're free to take your ease here if you so desire.
Welcome to Matchlock Menagerie. I'm afraid there are no longer any animals left, but you're free to take your ease here if you so desire.
Oh, the unenhanced warrior! Keep it up, you're doing great out there!
<sigh> I had such high hopes for Black Cat...
Hmph, you again. Like I said, enjoy this feeling while you can.
Damn it all... How could you do something so cruel to a starlet so sweet?

Oh hello, <Split(<Highlight>ObjectParameter(1)</Highlight>, ,1)/>. I must admit, I am still in shock after what Eutrope revealed to us... But Yaana and I will endeavor to find an alternative cure for the disease as quickly as we can.
Text[1]: Ah, speaking of Eutrope, have you ever found it strange that her name is so different from ours?
Text[2]: It's because she decided to change hers from the one our parents gave us to an Alexandrian name instead. Her progressive ideals are not limited to her ring persona─they are core to who she is.

Text[0]: Hey, it's the light-heavyweight champion! I knew you were amazing, but even I didn't think you would be able to take down Wicked Thunder. You truly are unstoppable!
Text[1]: I only wish I had been able to watch the match in person. It's a shame there weren't any seats, but I was cheering you on from afar!
Text[2]: Gosh, now I can hardly wait to see how you perform in the cruiserweight division!

Text[0]: A talented fighter and a brilliant scientist, Wicked Thunder actually fashioned her ring herself, using electrope.
Text[1]: The city within was born from her imagination and recreated with holograms. In such a space, she can easily wield her lightning techniques with reckless abandon.
Text[2]: Which makes the fact that she lost to you all the worse. Ugh, both those sisters are disappointments!

Text[0]: Well, if it ain't the new blood! Now's my chance to claim vengeance for the Brute Bomber!
Text[1]: ...I jest. He's been too lax ever since his crowning. Far as I'm concerned, you rightfully put him in his place.
Text[2]: With this loss, no doubt he'll be inspired with even dirtier tricks he can use to make a comeback!

Text[0]: Just so you know, Honey B. isn't solely an Arcadion fighter.
Text[1]: She also stars in concerts as a songstress, and even receives work as a model for advertisements!
Text[2]: Sh-She was just so tired from all of her responsibilities that she ended up losing to you. It was out of her control!

Text[0]: Apparently, the government are going to compensate everyone caught up in the attack. I haven't heard any official announcements, though. I won't be holding my breath, that's for sure.
Apparently, the government is going to compensate everyone caught up in the attack. I haven't heard any official announcements, though. I won't be holding my breath, that's for sure.

Text[1]: You've ventured to a strange yet extraordinary place, haven't you? Truly, the life of an adventurer is a wonderous thing.
You've ventured to a strange-yet-extraordinary place, haven't you? Truly, the life of an adventurer is a wondrous thing.

Text[0]: I was scared out of my wits when the machines started attacking, and I'm still shaking... But seeing you makes me feel a better. Thanks for coming by.
I was scared out of my wits when the machines started attacking, and I'm still shaking... But seeing you makes me feel better. Thanks for coming by.
